---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

# Introduction

## About the data

text!

## Setup


```{r load packages}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(here)
```


```{r}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
bg_chem <- read_csv(here('data', 'BGchem2008data.csv'))
```


```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: false
colnames(bg_chem)
str(bg_chem)
head(bg_chem)
summary(bg_chem)
```


```{r calculate Redfield ratio}
nitrate <- mean(bg_chem$NO3)
nitrite <- mean(bg_chem$NO2)
amm     <- mean(bg_chem$NH4)
phos    <- mean(bg_chem$P)

ratio <- (nitrate + nitrite + amm) / phos

```
The Redfield ratio for this dataset is approximately `{r} round(ratio)`.


```{r}
plot(bg_chem$P, bg_chem$NO2 + bg_chem$NO3 + bg_chem$NH4)
```
